# Lix — Pricing

## Plans

| Plan | Monthly | Annual (per month) | Email Credits | Search Data Rows | Included Users |
|------|---------|------------|-----------------|------------------|-----------------|
| **Starter** | Free | Free | 50/mo | 1,000 | 1 |
| **Leads** | ~£39 | ~£31 (~$39 USD) | 300–1,000 | 3,000 | 3 |
| **Data Plus** (Miner) | ~£109 | ~£89 (~$109 USD) | 500–10,000 | Unlimited | 3 |
| **Custom** | Contact Sales | Contact Sales | Custom | Custom | Custom |

## API Add-ons (Pay-as-you-go)

| Add-on | Price | Coverage |
|--------|-------|----------|
| Standard Credits | $49 for 500 credits | LinkedIn + Search APIs |
| Org Credits | $49 for 2,500 credits | Organization data |

## Credit / Usage Model

- $0.15/email for additional valid emails
- Credits roll over monthly (expire after 1 year)
- Credit-based; credits consumed per LinkedIn profile export or email reveal
- Primarily a LinkedIn Sales Navigator scraper and contact export tool
- Works via Chrome extension and/or CSV export from LinkedIn list views

## TCO Notes

- Lix is positioned as a LinkedIn list exporter — strongest for scraping LinkedIn search results and Sales Navigator lists at scale
- Requires a LinkedIn account (and ideally Sales Navigator) to access the underlying search data
- Pairs naturally with Prospeo or Proxycurl for email enrichment after extracting LinkedIn URLs
- Less automation-API-friendly than Proxycurl; better suited for manual or semi-automated prospecting workflows
